tracks.meaning: a container or bag, typically made of paper, plastic, or cloth, used for carrying or holding items
a group of animals, especially wolves or wild dogs, that hunt together
to press or squeeze something tightly into a small space or container
a group of players or competitors on the same team or side
a large number or quantity of something bundled together
a set of animals, goods, or people traveling together as a convoy across a region
to assemble soldiers or equipment into a compact formation for transport
a compressed archive file containing multiple files or data bundled together
to wager a sum of money betting that multiple conditions will all occur together
a medicated patch or collection of medical supplies applied to the body
to charge someone with multiple related crimes or violations together
a collection of pages or sheets of paper assembled together for binding
